    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>09:13</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>08:45</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - Fable 5 has now also started returning errors. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 6</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:36</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
